name: GmailConnector
description: Connects to the Google Gmail API to read, search, modify, and send email messages, with incremental sync via the Gmail history API.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Google OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: Found in Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Google OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.help: Found alongside the Client ID in Google Cloud Console

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated list of Gmail API scopes. The gmail.send scope is required to send email.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 authorization endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Token URL
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 token endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Gmail API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Gmail REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Gmail API requests per minute. Default is 250 (Google's standard quota).

install_fields.label: Pagination Type
install_fields.help: Pagination strategy. Only 'page_token' is supported by the Gmail API.

install_fields.label: API Version
install_fields.help: Gmail REST API version. Leave blank to use 'v1'.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id and client_secret and marks the connector as installed. Call before OAuth authorization.

apis.name: Authorize (OAuth Code Exchange)
apis.description: Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens. Called by the platform after the user completes the OAuth consent screen.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Gmail API connectivity by fetching the authenticated user's profile.

apis.name: Sync Messages
apis.description: Syncs Gmail messages into the Shielva knowledge base. Uses incremental history sync when a checkpoint exists; falls back to full page scan.

apis.name: List Emails
apis.description: Lists Gmail message stubs matching a search query. Returns raw API response with message IDs and pagination token.

apis.name: Get Email
apis.description: Fetches a full Gmail message by ID and returns it as a NormalizedDocument.

apis.name: Modify Message
apis.description: Adds or removes label IDs on a Gmail message (e.g. mark as read, star, archive).

apis.name: Read Email (Raw)
apis.description: Returns the raw Gmail API message object for a given message ID. Use get_email() for a NormalizedDocument.

apis.name: Send Email
apis.description: Sends an email via the Gmail API. Builds a base64url-encoded RFC 2822 MIME message and POSTs to /users/me/messages/send. Requires gmail.send scope.

apis.name: Add Email (Create Draft)
apis.description: Creates a Gmail draft without sending. Uses the same MIME encoding path as send_email().

apis.name: Post Email (Send Alias)
apis.description: Public alias for send_email(). Provided for API surface completeness — delegates directly to send_email().
